name: Corn Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare corn bread, following label directions or your favorite recipe. Cool.
2. Crumble enough to make 7 cups and transfer to a large mixing bowl.
3. Saute celery and onion in butter in a large skillet until soft. Spoon vegetables and butter over corn bread crumbs.
4. Beat egg yolks in a medium-sized bowl; stir in stock and pour mixture over corn bread. Stir lightly to blend. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Makes approximately 3 quarts, or 12 cups.
